title: VEYOFLY Indoor Flying Insect Trap - Plug-in Fruit Fly, Gnat and Mosquito Trap With Refills - Odorless Bug Light for Home(2 Device + 4 Glue Boards)
bullet_points: ADVANCED FLY CONTROL WITH NO MESS OR ODOR- Keep your home safe and odor-free with this plug-in bug light trap for indoor use. This powerful device is designed to catch a diverse spectrum of insects, fruit flies, bugs and gnats without any mess or smell. Flies are irresistibly drawn to this cutting-edge device, thanks to its radiant UV light. Once lured inside, they find themselves ensnared by the formidable adhesive plate concealed within.

SAFE FOR ALL, INCLUDING PETS- Operates safely 24/7, offering an odorless and safe solution. It's a sustainable choice that not only keeps your environment bug-free but also champions low energy consumption.

EFFORTLESS PLUGN-IN DESIGN- Designed with user convenience at its core, this plugin in bug catcher embraces a plug-and-play ethos, offering unyielding protection across various settings, including kitchens, living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, warehouses, and basements. It steadfastly safeguards your home from disease-carrying insects, ensuring a secure and comfortable environment for all

UV LIGHT ATTRACTOR - AN IRRESISTIBLE TEMPTATION FOR FLIES -Featuring a ultraviolet LED lamp, VEYOFLY effectively lures and captures flies and insects, making it suitable for various environments, from homes to commercial and industrial settings, covering areas up to 400 square feet.

UNYIELDING GLUE BOARDS FOR INESCAPABLE CAPTURE- VEYOFLY’S glue boards boast an unparalleled, ultra-strong adhesive quality, rendering insect escapes an impossibility. The process is as simple as removing the protective cover, inserting the glue plate into the device, and witnessing the transformation of your surroundings into a fly-free zone.
